zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliane de Cantilupe於1219年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo35歲，母親Millicent Gournay30歲。她於1245年8月1日之前與Robert de Tregoz II結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年8月6日在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliane de Cantilupe于1219年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo35岁，母亲Millicent Gournay30岁。她于1245年8月1日之前与Robert de Tregoz II结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年8月6日在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Juliane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliane de Cantilupe was born in 1219, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, was 35 and her mother, Millicent Gournay, was 30. She married Robert de Tregoz II before 1 August 1245. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 6 August 1285, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliane de Cantilupe est née en 1219, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Millicent Gournay, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Tregoz II avant 1 août 1245. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1285, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliane de Cantilupe 1219 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo 35 und ihre Mutter Millicent Gournay 30. Sie hat vor 1. August 1245 Robert de Tregoz II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. August 1285 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane de Cantilupe è nata il nel 1219 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Millicent Gournay, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Tregoz II prima del 1 agosto 1245. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 agosto 1285, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliane de Cantilupeが1219年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloは35歳，母Millicent Gournayは30歳であった。1245年8月1日以前にRobert de Tregoz IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年8月6日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliane de Cantilupe(이)가 1219년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent Gournay(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1245년 8월 1일 이전 Robert de Tregoz II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 8월 6일 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane de Cantilupe nasceu em 1219, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Millicent Gournay, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Tregoz II antes 1 de agosto de 1245. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1285, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliane de Cantilupe родилась в 1219 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent Gournay, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Tregoz II перед 1 августа 1245 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 августа 1285 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliane de Cantilupe nació en 1219, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Millicent Gournay, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Robert de Tregoz II antes de 1 de agosto de 1245. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1285, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
